source: Claude data-source inventory integration (read-only): copied DATA_INVENTORY.md, SOURCE_FIELD_AUDIT.md, STRATEGIC_DEEP_RESEARCH_2026-05-10.md, FDEP_ERP_AUDIT_2026-05-10.md, BROWARD_BCS_AUDIT_2026-05-10.md, BROWARD_LIENS_AUDIT_2026-05-10.md, THREE_SOURCE_AUDIT_2026-05-10.md, MISSING_FEEDS_BACKLOG.md, WEEKLY_SIGNAL_PACKET_SCHEMA.md + field_registry.json + dashboard_summary.json. Strictly sandbox. No live calls, no scraping, no writes.
notes: This is the single source of truth for Source Roadmap in the sandbox cockpit. Statuses reflect current local snapshot + Claude audit findings. All future adapters must reference these entries. | Normalized for this request: added explicit "status" and "risk_level" fields on every source (2026-05-28 follow-up pass).

sources.known_gaps: applicant_email, applicant_address, co_date, usage_class, original_valuation, assigned_to not stored; finalized_date 0% populated in source reports; owner_name near 0% on recent rows
dependencies: Accela Crystal Reports exports (3 report types)
sources.first_safe_test: Validate HEADER_MAP + raw_<label> fallback on existing permits_sample.json + accela_raw_example.json
sources.hard_boundaries: Sandbox only. No live Accela API or CSV download. Current data is static snapshot from permits_READONLY.sqlite.

fields_available: ~45+ DOM fields on CapDetail: workflow, valuation richer, inspections, related records, contractor_license, applicant details, conditions, documents
sources.known_gaps: applicant_name and parcel_block extraction dead (0% despite scraper code); workflow/related/conditions mostly in JSON blobs not normalized columns
sources.first_safe_test: Parse accela_raw_example.json + permits with accela_details joins in current snapshot
sources.hard_boundaries: No live detail page scraping. All data from local snapshot only.

sources.known_gaps: 9,919 of 19,973 rows in current accela_inspections are pagination junk (empty type, 'View Details', page numbers)
sources.first_safe_test: Filter junk rows from existing accela_inspections in sandbox snapshot; validate against 100 known permits
sources.hard_boundaries: No new scraping. Current table has known data quality issues from prior scrape.

fields_captured: related_permits_json (stored but unparsed in most rows)
sources.known_gaps: No normalized subpermit_events table; parent/child relationships not resolved in current snapshot
sources.first_safe_test: Inspect related_permits_json on 50 high-value permits in permits_sample + accela details
sources.hard_boundaries: No live calls. Subpermit resolution is future enrichment only.

sources.known_gaps: Only ~8-17% parcel_id_verified overall; mailing address, legal, neighborhood, voting not extracted from raw_json; Tier 2 (deeper attrs) not populated
sources.first_safe_test: Re-run bcpa_tier1 enrichment on current 1000-row sample; measure folio match rate improvement
sources.hard_boundaries: Sandbox local snapshots only. No live BCPA API calls.

fields_available: ~190 fields in parcelInfo + sub-blocks: just_value, land_value, building_value, living_area, year_built, beds, baths, picture_path, owner alerts, etc.
sources.known_gaps: ~17% capture of exposed fields; sales history, tax history, flood, mailing address buried in JSON or separate tables with low coverage
sources.first_safe_test: Validate bcpa_property_card table row count + raw_json integrity against 100 known folios in snapshot
sources.hard_boundaries: No live BCPA calls. Current data is frozen snapshot.

fields_available: saleDate1-5, deedType1-5, stampAmount1-5, salePrice1-5, buyer/seller from BCPA card inline + dedicated bcpa_sales_history table
fields_captured: bcpa_sales_history table covers only 26% of matched parcels
sources.known_gaps: Majority of matched parcels lack sales rows; 5-row inline history not extracted to columns
sources.first_safe_test: Count bcpa_sales_history rows vs matched folios in current DB snapshot; spot-check 10 recent sales
sources.hard_boundaries: No live enrichment. Historical sales data incomplete in sandbox.

fields_available: tax_year, assessed_value, taxes_paid, exemptions from BCPA card / dedicated table
fields_captured: bcpa_tax_history table (very low row count in current snapshot)
sources.known_gaps: Almost no tax history rows populated despite source availability
sources.first_safe_test: Query bcpa_tax_history coverage in sandbox snapshot
sources.hard_boundaries: Not exercised in current data load. Future only.

fields_available: flood_zone, flood_map, panel, base_flood_elevation from BCPA property card
fields_captured: Not extracted to dedicated column or bcpa_flood_zone table in current snapshot
sources.known_gaps: Critical for seawall/NAVD + insurance signals; zero structured capture today
sources.first_safe_test: Inspect raw_json of 20 bcpa_property_card rows for flood keys; design extraction
sources.hard_boundaries: No live BCPA. Flood data is available in raw but unused.

fields_available: 36 master fields + 6x7 officer fields per entity: entity_name, document_number, status, officers, address, filing dates (full 12.6M entities, 20.6M officers)
fields_captured: sunbiz_entities + sunbiz_officers tables (bulk loaded via ingest_sunbiz_sftp.py)
sources.known_gaps: Name matching coverage low on owners (0.8% recent); officer links and LLC docs mostly missing from resolution layer
dependencies: Florida DOS SFTP quarterly + daily deltas
sources.first_safe_test: Validate sunbiz bulk load row counts + sample officer matches against 100 contractors in snapshot
sources.hard_boundaries: Current data is static SFTP snapshot. No new SFTP pulls in sandbox.

fields_available: Fuzzy + deterministic match of permit owner_name/contractor_name -> Sunbiz document_number + officers
sources.known_gaps: Owner matching near zero on newest rows; no 2-hop graph; no officer role extraction into resolution
sources.first_safe_test: Re-run backfill_sunbiz_matches on current 1000-row sample; measure contractor match lift
sources.hard_boundaries: No live Sunbiz. Matching logic frozen at snapshot state.

fields_available: ~2500-2700 daily records: document_type (NOC, LIE, LP, FJ, CFJ, RST, DEED, MORT), document_number, parties (grantor/grantee), legal_description, parcel_id (folio format), recording_date, book/page, consideration (6 pipe files/day via public SFTP bcftp.broward.org)
sources.known_gaps: Zero ingestion in current sandbox snapshot. Highest-leverage missing feed per all audits.
sources.first_safe_test: Download one daily Official_Records_Download/ bundle (10 most recent days retained); parse one file type (e.g. NOC); count matches against 50 known permits by folio/owner
sources.hard_boundaries: NOT APPROVED FOR LIVE SFTP PULLS. Sandbox only. Public credentials documented but no automation yet. 3-4 day QA lag noted.

fields_captured: lat, lon (7.2% overall, many from BCPA instead)
sources.known_gaps: 23+ days stale per dashboard_summary; many rows still missing or low-confidence; BCPA centroid preferred but incomplete
sources.first_safe_test: Re-geocode the stale cohort identified in dashboard_summary using local cache only
sources.hard_boundaries: No live Google API calls. Current geocode data is frozen and partially stale.

fields_available: resolved_owner_name, confidence, requires_human_verification, source (BCPA + Accela + Sunbiz + fuzzy)
sources.known_gaps: Low confidence on many LLC shells; human verify flag not wired; contractor resolution not yet extended (per audits); mailing_is_same_as_situs not auto-updated
sources.first_safe_test: Run resolution on 100 recent permits; spot-audit 10 low-confidence cases against BCPA raw
sources.hard_boundaries: Current resolution table is snapshot-only. No new matching runs.

fields_available: sale_price, sale_date, buyer, seller, deed_type, folio from external land sales feeds (not detailed in current audits)
sources.known_gaps: No table or feed integrated; overlaps with BCPA sales but external market comps missing
dependencies: External land sales data vendor or public records
sources.first_safe_test: Identify public Broward land sales source; manual cross-ref 5 recent high-value permits
sources.hard_boundaries: Not in scope for current sandbox. Future research only.

fields_available: 11 search interfaces: Permits, Contractor License (CC# + status + void_date), Certificate of Use (CU#, Category, Required Inspections, Status), Code Compliance / Enforcement (case#, Unsafe Structure with Expired Permit Number, folio), Elevators
sources.known_gaps: Zero data in sandbox. POSSE web UI only (no API, session cookies, wildcard search). Highest value: Unsafe Structure (joins on expired permit), contractor license status (void cards), CU tenant turnover.
sources.first_safe_test: Manual polite browser search for 5 known high-volume contractors + 5 expired permits from snapshot; capture PosseObjectId permalinks; design throttle (1 req/5s)
sources.hard_boundaries: NOT APPROVED FOR AUTOMATED SCRAPING. High boundary: session/cookie/Cloudflare risk. Manual research only in sandbox. Explicit future approval + robots/ToS review required.

fields_available: application_id, project_name, status, applicant, location (lat/lon), documents (DepNexus PDF links), ERP type (dock, seawall, wetland, stormwater), received_date, county (8 feature layers on ca.dep.state.fl.us/arcgis/rest/services/OpenData/ERP/)
sources.known_gaps: Zero ERP records in current sandbox. Clean geo + docs, 5-6 week leading indicator validated on real cross-refs (e.g. dock extension ERP then building permits).
dependencies: FDEP ArcGIS REST (no auth, no rate limit)
sources.first_safe_test: Dry-run query Layer 1 (or all ERP) for Broward bbox + last 90 days; return 10-20 records; validate schema + cross-ref 2-3 known dock/seawall permits from snapshot
sources.hard_boundaries: NOT APPROVED FOR LIVE CALLS YET. Recommended first live candidate per audits. Explicit operator approval + dry-run + kill switch + rate policy required in future sprint. Sandbox mock only.

fields_available: ASN, sponsor, structureType (incl CRANE), aglStructureHeight, latitude, longitude, statusCode, dateEntered (11 GET endpoints, XML, oeaaa.faa.gov, no auth, weekly CSV bulk)
sources.known_gaps: Zero FAA data in sandbox. Crane filings are leading indicator of active construction before permits visible.
sources.first_safe_test: Single call to one endpoint for FL/2026 sample (4,623 ASNs in prior test); filter cranes + Broward bbox; manual cross to 3 high-rise permits
sources.hard_boundaries: No live FAA calls in sandbox. Public API but not exercised.

fields_available: case #, 12-char Parcel ID (exact BCPA folio), address, final judgment amount, plaintiff, max bid, auction date/time (daily iterable URL on broward.realforeclose.com)
sources.known_gaps: Zero data. ~100-150/month in Broward. Distress signal for owners/contractors with active permits.
dependencies: RealAuction platform (public view, login only for bid)
sources.first_safe_test: Browse one AUCTIONDATE page for current week; extract 5-10 rows; match 1-2 against known folios in snapshot
sources.hard_boundaries: No automated scraping. Manual review only for research.

fields_available: Water/sewer service layers, utility connection points, CRA boundaries, opportunity zones, canal/intracoastal shapefiles (Broward GIS REST + ArcGIS Online)
sources.known_gaps: No AGOL or utility layers integrated. Proximity to water/sewer + CRA useful for signals.
sources.first_safe_test: Query one public water/sewer layer for 5 known FTL permit locations; validate join feasibility
sources.hard_boundaries: No live GIS queries in sandbox. Future infrastructure layer.

fields_available: NOC-specific records (~260/day) from Official Records SFTP: owner, contractor, folio, recording_date, legal (subset of Broward Clerk feed)
sources.known_gaps: NOC is the single highest-ROI subset of Clerk feed (FS 713.13 pre-inspection requirement). Not ingested.
sources.first_safe_test: From one daily Clerk file, filter NOC rows; join 5-10 to permits by folio + contractor_name
sources.hard_boundaries: Part of Broward Clerk SFTP. Same hard boundary: no live pulls yet.

fields_available: Enforcement cases, Unsafe Structure, Code Compliance from BCS SearchForEnforcement + ParcelSearchForEnforcement (case#, folio, status, type, created_date)
sources.known_gaps: Subset of BCS. Unsafe Structure is the star (expired permit join). No data today.
sources.first_safe_test: Manual search BCS Enforcement for 3 known expired permits from snapshot; record PosseObjectId + status
sources.hard_boundaries: Same as BCS: scrape risk, not approved for automation. Manual only.

fields_available: Municipal lien data (code fines, utility liens, special assessments) from various city conduits (not detailed in primary audits)
sources.known_gaps: No municipal lien feed integrated. Overlaps with Clerk but city-specific.
sources.first_safe_test: Research Fort Lauderdale + 2 other Broward cities for public lien export options
sources.hard_boundaries: Out of current scope. Not prioritized in Claude audits.

fields_available: Planning/zoning/commission minutes, agendas, resolutions mentioning permits, owners, projects (PDF + text)
sources.known_gaps: Narrative context (community opposition, variances, political) completely absent from structured data.
dependencies: City clerk portals (FTL + others), PDF OCR/extraction
sources.first_safe_test: Manual pull 2-3 recent FTL commission packets; keyword search 5 active high-value permits
sources.hard_boundaries: Future NLP layer. No current ingestion or OCR in sandbox.

fields_available: Distance to canal/intracoastal/ocean, CRA membership, opportunity zone, flood zone, school district, etc. (computed from GIS layers + permit lat/lon)
sources.known_gaps: No proximity features computed. Required for NAVD seawall + many signals.
sources.first_safe_test: Load 2-3 Broward water shapefiles; compute distance for 20 permits with known lat/lon
sources.hard_boundaries: Scoring layer deferred per all prior sprints (no FAST/enrichment/scoring in this sandbox).

fields_available: Seawall elevation, NAVD datum compliance, repair/permitting status (derived from FDEP ERP + BCPA flood + county seawall layer + permit description)
sources.known_gaps: No seawall-specific layer. Critical post-hurricane + flood insurance signal.
sources.first_safe_test: Filter FDEP ERP for seawall/dock keywords in 2026; cross 3 to BCPA flood + building permits
sources.hard_boundaries: Requires FDEP + GIS + NLP. Deferred until core ERP/BCS/Clerk landed.

fields_available: Full structured packet per signal: permit snapshot, owner graph (BCPA+Sunbiz+resolution), contractor (Accela+Sunbiz+BCS license), liens/NOC (future Clerk), ERP cross-refs, BCPA card, provenance, raw_json sections per WEEKLY_SIGNAL_PACKET_SCHEMA
sources.known_gaps: Generator does not exist in sandbox. Schema is fully specified; no execution.
dependencies: All core + high-value sources (Accela, BCPA, Sunbiz, Owner Resolution, future Clerk/ERP/BCS)
sources.first_safe_test: Implement client-side packet builder for 3 high-value permits using existing local JSONs; emit sample matching schema
sources.hard_boundaries: No production packet generation. This sandbox cockpit can only preview stub packets from local data.

fields_available: Independent AI critiques of signal packets, red-team findings, hallucination checks, alternative explanations
sources.known_gaps: No AI review layer implemented. Pure future.
sources.first_safe_test: Manual prompt 2-3 sample packets through 2 different models; compare outputs by hand
sources.hard_boundaries: Explicitly out of scope for this sandbox (no enrichment, no scoring, no live AI). Research only.

fields_available: GeoJSON export of permits + signals + ERP + Clerk points + heat layers for spatial analysis in Kepler.gl
sources.known_gaps: No geo export or Kepler config in cockpit. Static maps only in current UI.
sources.first_safe_test: Export 500 permits with lat/lon from permits_sample as GeoJSON; load in local Kepler.gl instance
sources.hard_boundaries: Visualization only. No new data collection. Future UX layer.
